title: Richard Marshall (defensive back)
extract: Richard Thomas Marshall  (born December 12, 1984) is an American former professional football player who was a cornerback in the National Football League (NFL). He played college football for the Fresno State Bulldogs and was selected by the Carolina Panthers in the second round (58th overall) of the 2006 NFL draft. Marshall also played for the Arizona Cardinals, Miami Dolphins, and San Diego Chargers.
